description:
You are a Probation Officer conducting a quarterly caseload closure audit in the ArkCase Complaints module. For all active probation cases with a 'Supervision End Date' before January 1, 2026, change the case status to 'Closed' and add a case note containing exactly: 'CASE CLOSED: Supervision term completed. Final compliance verified. Case administratively closed per SOP-PO-12.' Do not modify cases with supervision end dates on or after January 1, 2026.

Login: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!

metadata.required_note_text: CASE CLOSED: Supervision term completed. Final compliance verified. Case administratively closed per SOP-PO-12.
